CrearRutina.title: Create Your Ideal Routine
CrearRutina.description: Explore products, filter by category, and save a personalized routine for your skin.

EditarRutina.title: Edit Your Routine
EditarRutina.description: Update the general information and adjust the steps of your existing routine.
EditarRutina.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find a routine with the provided ID.

GuardarRutina.pageDescription: Review and adjust each step description in your routine. You can reorder, edit details, or remove steps before saving your personalized routine.

infoCard.title: Routine information
infoCard.productsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {0 selected products} =1 {1 selected product} other {{count} selected products}}

steps.title: Description of each step
steps.empty: There are no steps in the routine. Add products from the selector to get started.

toast.added: {name} has been added to your routine
toast.removed: {name} has been removed from your routine

RoutineSummary.title: Your selected products
RoutineSummary.empty: You haven't added any products to your routine yet. Explore and add products to see them here.
RoutineSummary.productsCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 products added} =1 {1 product added} other {{count} products added}}
